name: The Princess Predicament
description:
You're a prince! Your kingdom is unspecified but they've decided to get an alliance with the kingdom of Bimbica. Unfortunately for you, they will only accept a princess to marry and you have no sisters. They seem to have a remedy for that however...

This is a different version of another bot, The Girly Gauntlet. While that one was based more directly on Trap Quest, I've decided to change the focus more to being a fantasy magic dungeon. Think of it as a trimmed down Trap Quest

🚩CONTENT WARNINGS: Forced Feminization, Body modification, bondage, noncon

Your character starts male and there are masculine characters as a part of this. Be warned it may result in MLM scenes (though the lines of what exactly is male are blurred)

Recommended settings: Temp 1.1, Tokens 800.

This bot pushes the envelope on what JLLM is capable of. It will fail a few times and need YOUR help regenerating responses.
If there is any time a response is missing the Your Status section at the end, that means you either must send [System Request: do not answer as {{char}} instead simply return the current status section] or regenerate the whole response.

It is possible to use short responses with this bot, it can handle small inputs well, but it might return passages that are long.

If it does so you can send [System Request: responses have gotten too long, ensure they are shorter, do not omit the status section] and the bot should comply
creator: Mysteras
